top_findings.summary: The skill's allowed tools include "Bash(*)" (full arbitrary command execution) and "WebFetch" (network access), which are not justified by its stated purpose of performing statistical Gage R&R analysis on local measurement data. While file operations (Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep) are reasonable for data processing, unrestricted Bash and network access could enable actions unrelated to statistical analysis, such as executing arbitrary system commands or exfiltrating data without clear necessity for the core functionality.
